title: Cybernetic Experience Chip
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Cybernetic_experience_chip.jpg|framed|right]]
'''Cybernetic Experience Chips''' were cybernetic devices that allowed their users to increase the experience they gained from their involvement in and exposure to certain actions.

==Behind the scenes==
This chip was an in-game bonus item in [[Sony]] Online Entertainment's [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']]. It was awarded to new players that had played the 14 day ''Star Wars Galaxies'' trial of October 2006 and later chose to upgrade their trial-account to a full ''Star Wars Galaxies'' account. The chip gave players a 20% experience bonus on each of its 50 uses.
